name: Chocolate Chip Cheesecake Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the raisins and brandy, ensuring all raisins are coated; let soak for 15 minutes.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the cream cheese and whipping cream until well blended and smooth.
3. Add vanilla extract and mix thoroughly.
4. Blend in the brown sugar and cinnamon.
5. Incorporate the soaked raisins and mini chocolate chips, mixing well.
6. Garnish with a light dusting of cinnamon.
7. Serve at room temperature.
Makes about 3 3/4 cups of dip.
Suggested dippers: Graham Crackers, Honeydew Melon, Strawberries, Peaches, Dried Fruit, Pound Cake Cubes
